title: Block Print Party
description: Join us for a fun and creative block printing session where you'll learn the basics of hand block printing using traditional wooden stamps and natural dyes. Perfect for beginners and those looking to unwind through art.

title: Eco Print Workshop
description: Discover the magical world of botanical eco printing. Use leaves, flowers, and natural mordants to create stunning one-of-a-kind textile prints inspired by nature.

title: Block Printing Workshop
description: Transform your workplace into a space of creativity, collaboration, and meaningful team experiences. Our corporate block printing workshop is designed to foster teamwork while exploring the timeless craft of hand printing.
includes: Guided Step-By-Step Instruction By Experienced Facilitators
Customizable Themes Based On Your Team Or Event

title: Children's Block Print
description: An age-appropriate introduction to block printing for children aged 6–14. Kids create their own stamped artwork using safe, water-based natural dyes and pre-carved wooden blocks.

title: Textile Arts Deep Dive
description: A 4-week immersive course for design students and creative learners. Covers block carving, colour theory with natural dyes, repeat pattern design, and fabric selection. Culminates in a personal collection of 5 printed pieces.
